name: HRQ_ALL_QSTN_ANSWERS_V
query: select QA.QSTN_ANSWER_ID AS QA_QSTN_ANSWER_ID, QA.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AS QA_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, QA.QUESTION_ID, QA.RATING_LEVEL_ID, QA.SEQ_NUM, QAT.QSTN_ANSWER_ID AS QAT_QSTN_ANSWER_ID, QAT.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AS QAT_BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, QAT.LANGUAGE, QAT.SHORT_TEXT, QAT.LONG_TEXT from HRQ_QSTN_ANSWERS_B QA, HRQ_QSTN_ANSWERS_TL QAT WHERE QA.QSTN_ANSWER_ID = QAT.QSTN_ANSWER_ID AND QA.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = QAT.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
